rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total>=1 -> FAIL
candidate_summary: TIFINAGH-SPARSE-TOK: tokenizer deliberately omits ~30% high-frequency non-content (vowel-analog) tokens; LLM contextual completion fills gap-markers at inference; targets token-count reduction for low-resource languages.

independent_scoring.title: TRIM Token Reduction Inference Modeling
independent_scoring.rationale: TRIM omits semantic-irrelevant easily-inferable words during inference and uses a smaller LM to reconstruct — direct twin of TIFINAGH-SPARSE-TOK's omit-then-context-fill paradigm; 19.41% token savings vs candidate's ~30% reduction.

independent_scoring.title: SlimInfer Dynamic Token Pruning Long-Context
independent_scoring.rationale: Prunes less-critical prompt tokens during forward pass; shares the omit-tokens-during-inference effect cluster.

independent_scoring.title: FTP Efficient Prefilling Long-Context LLM
independent_scoring.rationale: Attention-based pruning of non-critical tokens before FFN; same artefact family of selective token omission.

independent_scoring.title: Prompt Compression Every Token Count
independent_scoring.rationale: Broad survey of prompt compression covering omission-and-reconstruct paradigms.

independent_scoring.title: Reducing LLM API Costs 30% Text Preprocessing
independent_scoring.rationale: Stopword removal IS the LLM-domain analog of vowel-class omission in an abjad; achieves the same ~30% reduction figure candidate cites; near-identical mechanism.

independent_scoring.title: Token Compression Slash LLM Costs 80%
independent_scoring.rationale: LLMLingua-style token compression covers the deliberate-omission-for-throughput effect cluster.

independent_scoring.title: Training LLMs over Neurally Compressed Text
independent_scoring.rationale: Adjacent: training LLMs over compressed token sequences; same compress-and-reconstruct cluster.

independent_scoring.title: Getting Most Out of Tokenizer for Pre-training Domain Adaptation
independent_scoring.rationale: Tokenizer-level vocabulary optimization for low-resource/domain adaptation overlaps with candidate's tokenizer-vocabulary modification target.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: 8 of 8 retrieved results clear the threshold (all via sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7, with TRIM and Zartis stopword-removal serving as near-direct twins of TIFINAGH-SPARSE-TOK's deliberate-omit-then-context-fill mechanism), so total_hits (8) >= 1 triggers FAIL.
